scripts.otp: node --env-file=.env --input-type=module -e 'import redisClient from "./src/config/redis.js"; const wait=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms)); const phone=process.argv[1]; if(!phone){console.log("Usage: npm run otp -- <phone>"); process.exit(1);} let otp=null; for(let i=0;i<12;i++){if(redisClient.status==="ready"||redisClient.status==="connect"){try{otp=await redisClient.get("otp:"+phone);break;}catch(e){}} await wait(250);} console.log(otp?`OTP for ${phone}: ${otp}`:`No OTP found for ${phone} (expired or not generated)`); try{redisClient.disconnect();}catch{}'
scripts.email-otp: node --env-file=.env --input-type=module -e 'import redisClient from "./src/config/redis.js"; const wait=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms)); const email=process.argv[1]; if(!email){console.log("Usage: npm run email-otp -- <email>"); process.exit(1);} let otp=null; for(let i=0;i<12;i++){if(redisClient.status==="ready"||redisClient.status==="connect"){try{otp=await redisClient.get("emailotp:"+email);break;}catch(e){}} await wait(250);} console.log(otp?`Email OTP for ${email}: ${otp}`:`No email OTP found for ${email} (expired or not generated)`); try{redisClient.disconnect();}catch{}'
